title: psacalium decompositum
intro: Psacalium decompositum, also known as yerba de los burros or goat's weed, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central America and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Psacalium decompositum include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as the treatment of respiratory problems, like bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and can be used fresh or dried, depending on the desired herbal preparation.
